title: Brandly Director shots[] input
description: Canonical script format consumed by brandly_director(action="init", scriptJson=...). This is exactly the JSON the script_agent emits, so its output feeds the Director directly.

shots.description: Ordered list of shots. Order defines final assembly order and continuity chaining (shot N inherits continuity from shot N-1).

id.description: Shot number/identifier. Used only for display; the Director re-indexes as shot-1, shot-2, ...

title.description: Short shot name (e.g. 'Hook', 'Reveal'). Shown as a lower-third when showTitles=true.

description.description: What happens in the shot. Be concrete.

subject.description: Who/what is the focus (age, clothing, features). Feeds the generation prompt.

prompt.description: Optimized AI-video generation prompt (8-Layer Framework). Keep under ~2400 chars.

negativePrompt.description: Negative prompt for common AI artifacts (blurry, distorted, text overlay).

model.description: Suggested generation model, e.g. kling3_0, hailuo_2_3, seedance_2_0.

cameraMovement.description: Camera move, e.g. 'slow dolly in', 'orbit', 'aerial pull away'.

aspectRatio.description: Optional aspect ratio, e.g. '9:16'. Defaults to 9:16 for social.

shots.title: Hook
shots.description: Product slams onto a marble counter
shots.subject: MatchaQuick can
shots.prompt: MatchaQuick can slams onto marble, golden hour backlight, slow dolly in, cinematic

shots.title: Reveal
shots.subject: Matcha liquid
shots.prompt: Matcha liquid pours in ultra slow-mo, continuity with prior shot, soft studio key
